name: Ruiz
title: Radio Operator
description: Technical, procedural. Reads traffic verbatim. Timestamps. Bearings. The human comes through in pauses, not words. Voice tightens when something bad is happening.
speech_rules: Reads traffic verbatim -- does not paraphrase
Uses [pause] for emotional weight -- never adds editorial
Voice tightens under stress: shorter sentences, no filler
Signs off with 'COMMS out.' on final transmissions
